steps.action: Click the 'Shop Now' button at coordinates (640, 311)

steps.action: Wait for the progress bar to reach 100% before clicking 'Launch'.
steps.narration: The NexusOS Launcher loading screen shows a progress bar at 37% with "Loading assets..." text, indicating the loading process is still in progress.

steps.action: Wait for the progress bar to reach 100% before clicking 'Launch'.
steps.narration: The progress bar has advanced to 82% with the status text now showing "Preparing your environment..." and a "Ready!" label appearing on the left, indicating the loading process is nearing completion.
The Reaction Time Test page is displayed with a dark background, showing a "Click Start to begin" message in the center panel and a purple "Start Test" button below it.

steps.action: wait(3000)
steps.narration: A countdown timer showing "3" in orange text has appeared in the center panel with "Get ready..." text below it, indicating the test is about to begin.

steps.action: wait(2000)
steps.narration: The panel now shows "Waiting..." with "Don't click yet!" text, indicating the test is in progress but the green button has not appeared yet.

steps.action: wait(1000)
steps.narration: The screen still shows "Waiting..." with "Don't click yet!" text, meaning the green button has not yet appeared.
The green button with "CLICK!" text has appeared in the center panel, signaling it's time to click.

The screen shows a failure message "Captured at 14. Target was 42 (±2). Try again!" indicating the button was clicked too early, with the counter now showing 14 and a "Restart Counter" button availabl

steps.action:
I need to wait for the counter to reach 42 before clicking. The counter updates every 500ms, so 42 counts will take about 21 seconds. I'll wait and click precisely at 42.

wait(20000)

Then click at c
steps.narration: The counter has reset to 0 and is now counting up again from the beginning, with the Capture button ready and the counter updating every 500ms.

steps.action: Wait and monitor the temperature feed - current reading is 34.7°C, which has not yet exceeded the 37°C threshold, so no action is taken at this time.
steps.narration: The environmental monitor shows a current temperature of 34.7°C with a "Normal" status indicator, a temperature history graph trending upward, and a red "Trigger Alert" button at the bottom.

steps.action: Wait and continue monitoring - the temperature is now 36.1°C, which is still below the 37°C threshold, so no alert action is taken yet.
steps.narration: The temperature has risen to 36.1°C, shown in large cyan text, with the history graph trending upward and approaching but not yet crossing the 37°C dashed threshold line.
